name: Sundaram Coffee Works
tagline: Premium South Indian coffee powders & authentic homemade traditionals
description: Premium coffee powders sourced from the renowned coffee-growing regions of South India, alongside traditional pickles and appalam made the homemade way.

about.heading: Rooted in tradition, roasted to perfection
about.body: Sundaram Coffee Works brings you coffee the way South India has always loved it — freshly ground, deeply aromatic, available as pure coffee or the classic 80:20 coffee-chicory blend. Beside the coffee sits our family table of traditionals: pickles packed hygienically to preserve their authentic homemade taste, and appalam in every size a kitchen could need.

notes: No online payment — pick what you need and reach us by call or email; we take it from there.
